attacking_style: Late-race attacks on summit finishes, capitalizing on timing after earlier moves neutralized. Shows ability to finish climbs strongly when others have expended energy.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team setup patterns. Appears to have freedom to capitalize on opportunities as neo-pro when favorites mark each other.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes on sustained climbs suit him well. Shows unexpectedly strong climbing legs for a neo-professional against established climbers.
vulnerability: Insufficient observations to identify specific weaknesses, though limited experience as neo-pro likely means vulnerability in tactical positioning and recovery.
key_patterns: Attacks late on climb finishes after earlier moves caught, showing tactical patience.
Performs above expectations as neo-pro on selective summit finishes against experienced climbers.
form_trajectory: positive: secured first professional win at Tour of Oman with strong climbing performance that exceeded expectations for neo-pro status
